PG.rationale: PG trades at 28.7x P/E near the top of its 1-year range (23.8-30.8x) with modest 1Y return of +12.7% and recent 3M pullback of -2.5%; defensive quality is intact (ROE 27.6%, net margin 17.2%) but valuation premium and weak revenue trajectory (Q1 FY25 rev $21.74B vs FY24 quarterly run-rate ~$20.5B) limit upside.

3M return -2.5% vs 1Y +12.7% — momentum fading
News sentiment mostly positive but thin (n=1-2 per day)

KO.rationale: KO trades at a reasonable 25.8x P/E (mid of 1y range) with strong 22.5% net margins and 37% ROE, but the stock is down 12.3% over 3 months on weak Q3 EPS of $0.66 vs $0.74 prior quarter, while sentiment is overwhelmingly bullish (avg +0.7) suggesting the dividend/defensive narrative is well-known and priced in.

Net margin 22.5% and ROE 37% remain best-in-class
Stock down 12.3% over 3 months but up 4.1% over 1 year — defensive holding pattern
News sentiment strongly positive (+0.7 avg) but narrative is well-known
